Strategic Transformations B2P · Professional Women in Transition

Strategic
Reset Intensive

You are not behind. You are in between.

Career transitions in an unstable economy feel disorienting because they are. The rules have changed. AI is reshaping entire industries. And the old roadmap no longer applies.

The Strategic Reset Intensive is a curated small-group cohort for professional women who are ready to stop reacting and start building. You will leave with a personal and professional strategy, real AI tools you actually know how to use, and the clarity to move forward with intention.

Apply for the Next Cohort See What Is Included

The SRI at a Glance

Format

Small group cohort (virtual)

Who It Is For

Professional women in career transition

Focus Areas

Personal strategy, AI tools, economic positioning

Cohort Size

Limited seats per cohort

Outcome

A personal and professional strategy you can execute immediately

Pricing and cohort dates are shared during the application process. Seats are limited and filled on a rolling basis.

Not sure if the SRI is the right fit?

Take the free AI Readiness Quiz. It takes less than 3 minutes and tells you exactly where you stand and what your next move should be.

Take the Free Quiz →
Sound Familiar?

This is what it feels like to need a reset.

→

You are between roles, industries, or identities and the path forward is not clear.

→

You know AI is changing everything but you do not know where to start or what it means for your specific situation.

→

You have a strong resume and a real track record, but the market feels like it has shifted under your feet.

→

You are exhausted from pivoting reactively and ready to build something intentional.

→

You want a strategy, not just motivation. A plan, not just a pep talk.

→

You are doing this mostly alone and you are ready to be in a room with women who actually get it.

What You Get

Not a workshop. A strategic reset.

Every element of the SRI is designed to move you from overwhelmed to oriented.

🔄

Personal Strategy Session

You will build a clear, written strategy for your next chapter. Not a vision board. A real plan with priorities, timelines, and decision criteria.

🤖

AI Tools for Your Life

Learn which AI tools are actually useful for your situation and how to use them for career positioning, productivity, and personal workflow. No jargon. No overwhelm.

📍

Economic Positioning

Understand how to read the current market, identify where your skills are most valuable, and position yourself to build in an economy that keeps shifting.

🗺️

Work Strategy Blueprint

A structured framework for evaluating opportunities, negotiating your worth, and designing work that actually fits your life and your goals.

👥

Small Group Cohort

A curated, intimate group of professional women in similar transitions. Real conversation, shared tools, and the kind of community that does not let you stay stuck.

✅

Immediate Next Steps

You will leave every session with a specific action, not just insight. The SRI is built for execution, not just reflection.

The Shift

What changes when you reset with intention.

Before

Reacting to every job posting with anxiety

→

After

Applying strategically to roles that align with your blueprint

Before

Avoiding AI because it feels overwhelming

→

After

Using AI tools confidently to work smarter and position better

Before

Feeling behind in a shifting economy

→

After

Understanding exactly where your skills are most valuable right now

Before

Navigating transition alone and exhausted

→

After

Moving forward inside a community of women who are building alongside you

Before

Unclear on what you actually want next

→

After

A written strategy with priorities, timelines, and a clear next step

Before

Waiting for the right moment to start

→

After

In motion, with a plan, and accountability to keep going

Your Facilitator

Nikki Cates

CEO & Founder, Strategic Transformations · Army Veteran · Womanist Scholar · Published Author

Nikki Cates is a Structural Recalibration Strategist who has spent over 15 years helping individuals and organizations navigate high-stakes transitions. She is the creator of the UNMASK Framework, a proprietary diagnostic methodology used by leaders, organizations, and professionals to surface hidden structural strain and build a path forward.

The Strategic Reset Intensive was built because Nikki kept seeing the same thing: brilliant, capable professional women navigating major transitions without the structural tools to do it strategically. The SRI is the answer to that gap.

Ready to stop reacting
and start building?

Seats in each cohort are limited. Apply now to be considered for the next available cohort and take the first step toward your strategic reset.

Apply for the Next Cohort →

Not sure if this is right for you? Take the free AI Readiness Quiz first.
